Notice Of Motion And Motion To Remove Case To Binding Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-01-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Yaymond Yetka, 415.357.06000 for Plaintiff Barbara Velarde.
Christopher Hogan, Mosaica for Defendant 601 Homeowners association.

Argued by the planitiff. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's Motion to Remove Case to Binding Arbitration. is DENIED. Plaintiffs are incidental beneficiaries of the Joint Use Agreement rather than third-party beneficiaries who may enforce the arbitration provision within the Agreement. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
